notes: Global boss leaderboards live. Backend (Hetzner Go + Postgres) hosts boss_leaderboards table at api.pulsewavegame.com. Game submits time_ms + nickname on every kill, fetches top 10 per (boss × difficulty) on Boss Rush page entry. Panel header shows GLOBAL/LOCAL badge. Columns: rank, nickname, time (1ms precision), relative date. Your row highlighted by nickname match. Falls back to local cache if offline. Set your nickname in Settings — it shows on the public board.
